title: NIS2 CSIRT Notification Compliance and Channel Health

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: HTTP Event Collector (HEC), Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow (Splunkbase 1928)
spl:
index=reg_notify sourcetype="csirt:delivery" earliest=-90d
| lookup nis2_csirt_endpoint_catalog.csv csirt_id OUTPUT required_template_version
| eval template_ok=if(template_version=required_template_version,1,0)
| eval delivery_ok=if(match(lower(delivery_status),"success|accepted|202"),1,0)
| where delivery_ok=0 OR template_ok=0
| stats count by csirt_id delivery_status template_version required_template_version
| sort - count
value: Notifications must reach the competent CSIRT through approved channels. This use case monitors successful delivery of structured incident notifications (webhook/API/email handoff), template versioning, and cryptographic signing validation where used — reducing silent failures at the last mile.
implementation: (1) Instrument notification orchestrator to emit delivery events; (2) version PDF/XML templates per national CSIRT schema updates; (3) alert legal/IR on any non-2xx response or signature validation failure; (4) test channels quarterly with synthetic non-production payloads; (5) correlate with UC-22.2.33 deadlines.
visualization: Table (failed deliveries), Single value (failure rate), Timeline (delivery attempts), Bar chart (by CSIRT).
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
